AdditionalAttributes.description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos.

Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos. Just sprinkle the taco seasoning mix on 500g of lean minced beef, add 1 onion, then follow the instructions on the back of the pack. After heating the taco shells and stuffing them with your filling, you'll have made ready to eat Mexican tacos in less than 25 minutes — ideal for Taco Tuesday. Don’t forget to top with guacamole, cheese, sour cream, and salsa. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for beans. Perfect for a midweek Mexican feast or weekend get-togethers, share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine with all your family and friends. Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix flavours up to 10 delicious tacos.

This product is suitable for vegans.

Old El Paso Mini Tortillas Flour is super soft & flexible.

Taco Tuesday has never been more delicious than when Old El Paso™ Mini Flour Tortilla Wraps are involved. They work the best for soft tacos but you can also use them to make mini versions of your favourite hearty burritos, sizzling fajitas, or cheesy enchiladas. Suitable for vegetarians and vegans, these Mexican inspired tortilla wraps are easy to use and extra fun for little hands! KEWPIE MAYONNAISE is ideal to use on salads, sushi rools, fish and seafood or as a sandwich spread.

Made with egg yolks as opposed to whole eggs with specially blended vinegar, Kewpie Mayonnaise offers a smoother and creamier texture than many other types of mayonnaise. It is also a highly versatile product that opens up a wide range of possibilities in cooking, from drizzling onto Okonomiyaki (Japanese Pancake), dipping with deep-fried dishes to mixing into a nice, creamy potato salad.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Reduced Salt (contains 30% less sodium than regular Old El Paso™ Taco Spice Mix) Taco Spice Mix.

Spice up your night with Old El Paso™ Reduced Salt Taco Spice Mix. The perfect blend of rich tomatoes, cumin, and garlic adds delicious Mexican flavours to your favourite tacos. Just sprinkle the taco seasoning over 500g of lean beef mince and fry with 1 onion for a hearty taco filling in less than 25 minutes. Simply load into soft tortilla wraps or crunchy taco shells (or both) and add all your favourite toppings — think cheese, guacamole, sour cream, and tomato salsa — for tasty Mexican style tacos the Old El Paso™ way. Vegan? No problem. Simply swap the meat for beans. Each Old El Paso™ Reduced Salt Taco Spice Mix seasons up to 10 tacos. Perfect for sharing, there’s no greater happiness than eating Mexican food with people you love.

This product is suitable for vegans.

Craving Mexican food? Let us introduce you to Old El Paso™ Flour Tortilla Wraps — the perfect base for a whole range of delicious Mexican flavoured meals.

Craving Mexican food? Let us introduce you to Old El Paso™ Flour Tortilla Wraps — the perfect base for a whole range of delicious Mexican flavoured meals. Super soft and flexible to wrap around your favourite seasoned minced beef, shredded chicken, or vegetarian beans, they work for soft tacos, sizzling fajitas, cheesy enchiladas, and hot or cold lunch wraps. Suitable for vegetarians and vegans, these Mexican inspired tortilla wraps are easy, quick, and fun. Whether it's Fajita Friday, Taco Tuesday or any other night of the week, bring your family and friends together to share the rich flavours of Mexican cuisine.
